paper.title: Firm-specific capital, nominal rigidities
paper.authors: Altig, David; Christiano, Lawrence J.; Eichenbaum, Martin; Linde, Jesper

paper_side_sources_used.source_title_observed: Firm-Specific Capital, Nominal Rigidities and the Business Cycle
paper_side_sources_used.source_authors_observed: David Altig; Lawrence J. Christiano; Martin Eichenbaum; Jesper Linde
paper_side_sources_used.usage: Model overview, optimization problems, market clearing, shock processes, timing, and selected formula references.
Existence check and provenance only; PDF body was not read.

primary_mmb_mod.notes: Used only for variable names, model(linear) form, sticky/flexible block coverage, modelbase interest-rule substitution, shock names, calibration values, and technology-shock timing comments.

repo_example_mod.notes: Read only as the skill example implementation cross-check; not treated as paper-side mathematical evidence.

runtime_validation.notes: Current phase is private derivation extraction only. User explicitly instructed not to run Dynare.

formula_quality.reason: First-pass extraction from MinerU Markdown plus implementation cross-check. The paper refers to a technical appendix that is not present as a local normalization file, and several implementation-level equations require source-level formula review before promotion.

copyright_boundary: The derivation summarizes model structure and equations. It does not copy long prose from the paper or appendix.
